notes: Execution engine is live with owner-only task routing, guarded workspace updates, project workspace scaffolding, guarded command actions, and stricter Windows-safe local preview behavior. In local Windows mode, project tasks build and refine their workspace, skip project installs, skip detached project starts, and skip project git follow-up.

currentArchitecture: Owner-only admin bot is integrated into the main site and persists state in .data/bot-db.json
Autonomous research tasks can update ai/library.json
Autonomous project tasks should build inside admin-projects/workspaces/<project-slug>/
Generated project workspaces are surfaced through the owner-only /admin/projects route
Guarded commands exist for installs, restart, and project-scoped git/process operations
Task XRPL Trading Interface currently builds into admin-projects/workspaces/personal-xrpl-bot
knownGuardrails: Protect root public files: index.html, script.js, style.css, .well-known/, sessions/public assets
Do not replace the root app bootstrap or strip required root package scripts/dependencies
Project app previews on Windows should use the main app route instead of detached workspace launch
Project installs are skipped in Windows-safe local mode
Project git follow-up is skipped in Windows-safe local mode
Malformed or control-character paths should be rejected or sanitized before writing
currentWeakPoints: The model can still ask for commands that are not useful in Windows-safe local mode
Project tasks previously drifted into library-only completions and must be treated as incomplete unless non-library files change
Root-file edits still need careful validation when server.js or package.json are touched
workspaceState: Legacy duplicate workspace clutter was cleaned from admin-projects/xrpl-trading-bot
Malformed duplicate README file in personal-xrpl-bot was removed
